query:
UPDATE stocks SET ytdStartPrice = 207.9, ytdPerformance = ((156.45 - 207.9) / 207.9 * 100) WHERE ticker = 'KNIN.SW';
UPDATE stocks SET ytdStartPrice = 438.0, ytdPerformance = ((509.0 - 438.0) / 438.0 * 100) WHERE ticker = 'SGKN.SW';
